comments.author: Sea-Mud-8378
comments.body: Is it manual strategy or use bot also?

replies.author: Aggravating-Ebb-2580
replies.body: I use  trading robot, it runs on my platform 24/7 and executes trades automatically based on rules I programmed in. No emotions, no second guessing, just pure execution 🤖 For entries I look at key price levels where big money has been active, wait for Gold to sweep liquidity above or below those levels, then enter when price shows signs of reversing.

comments.author: Odd-Western-2865
comments.body: Pode compartilhar sua estratégia ? Ou até mesmo o expert advisor ?
